overview: Tactical RPG on Internet Computer with a unified summon subsystem, sophisticated AI, and an auto-expanding chat panel.
features: Unified combatant render dispatch so all summons render as distinct colorful creatures
Summon turns routed through the unified AI pipeline with five archetype profiles
Lifespan expiry routed through the shared death-removal path with no ghost turn entries
AI sophistication pass with lethal lookahead, overkill spill, and backline protection
Chat panel that auto-expands horizontally to fit all enabled channel tabs
